description: TURN ON RIGHT AND LEFT TURN SIGNAL TURN SIGNAL ARM IS PROPERLY MOUNTED AND WORKING PROPERLY NO BENDS , NO BREAKS , NO CRACKS NO ILLEGAL WELD, RIGHT SIGNAL LIGHT AND LEFT SIGNAL LIGHT ARE WORKING  PROPERLY. (FLIP SIGNAL ARM UP AND DOWN )
TURN ON 4 WAY FLASHER EMERGENCY HAZARD LIGHTS Property mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, break, or crack. No illegal weld. Working propady.
TURN ON LIGHTS BOTH HIGH AND LOW BEAMS , Properly mounted. Good working condition. No bends, breaks, or cracks. No illegal welds. Working property.
ABC FIRE EXTINGUISHERT Fully charged. Up to date. Safety pin present. Unit is secured so that it can not move around in the cab.
3 REFLECTIVE TRIANGLES Warning device. All should be present. Properly secured so they can not move around the cab.
SPARE FUSES - Various size amp fuses are present when needed.
HEATER AND DEFROSTER - (Turn on heater, hot and check with your hand.) Properly Mounted, Good working condition.
CITY & HIGHWAY HORN - (Press to make the sound) "This is my city horn. This is my highway horn. Properly mounted. Good working condition. Working properly."

TRAFFIC MONITORING DEVICES/MIRRORS - Properly mounted. Both driver and passenger's side mirrors are working properly. No bends, breaks, or cracks. No illegal welds. No more than 10 inches away from the cab. No illegal stickers. Fully adjustable to the driver's view. (Press the mirror button to adjust both mirrors. Do not use your hand to manually adjust the mirror)
WINDSHIELD - Properly mounted. Good working condition. No cracks or illegal stickers. Rubber seal is present and in good condition.
WIPERS AND WASHER - Turn on the wiper and press water to wash the windshield. Properly mounted, good working condition. No bonds, breaks, or cracks. No illegal welds. No missing bolts.
TOP LIGHT'S / ID LIGHTS - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not cracked or broken. None missing. Amber in color.
HEADLIGHTS - Properly mounted. Both left and right lights are in good working condition. Not cracked or broken. None missing. High beam and low beam.
INDICATOR LIGHTS / TURN SIGNALS - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not cracked or broken. None missing. Amber in color. 4-way emergency flasher. Left and right lights working properly.

WASHER FLUID RESERVOIR - Properly Mounted. Good Working Condition. Not Cracked or Broken. Not leaking any fluid. Not missing any bolts. Cap properly secured. Checked daily to make sure at proper level.
HOSES/Air Brake Hoses - Properly Mounted. Good Working Condition. No holes, cuts, bubbles. Not leaking any fluids.

WATER COOLANT RESERVOIR/TANK - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not cracked or broken. Not leaking any fluid. Not missing any bolts. Cap properly secured. Checked daily to make sure at the proper level.
HOSES (FROM WATER COOLANT) - Properly mounted. Good working condition. No holes, cuts, bubbles. Not leaking any fluids.

POWER STEERING FLUID RESERVOIR / TANK - Properly mounted. Good working condition. No bends, break, or crack. No illegal weld. Missing no bolts. Not leaking any fluids. Cap properly secured. Checked daily to make sure I was at the proper level.

OIL FILL - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, break, or crack. No illegal weld. Not leaking any fluid. The cap needs to be properly secured but also easy on easy off. This is where I fill up my engine oil.

OIL DIP STICK - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, break, or crack. No illegal weld. Not leaking any fluid. Cap needs to be properly secured but also easy on easy off. I can check if the oil is at the correct level by: *ONLY EXPLAIN* Remove the oil stick and clean it. Reinsert the stick and pull out again. Check if the oil level is between minimum and maximum.
STEERING COLUMN - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, cracked, or broken. No illegal welds.
STEERING BOOT - Properly mounted. Good working condition. No cuts, tears, rips.
STEERING BOX - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, break, or crack. No illegal welds. Missing no bolts. Not leaking any fluids.
PITMAN ARM - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, break, or crack. No illegal weld. Missing no bolts. Secured with a castle nut and a cotter pin.
DRAG LINK - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bends, cracked, or broken. No illegal weld.
STEERING ARM - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, break, or crack. No illegal welds. Secured with a castle nut and a cotter pin.

TIRE (I.C.D. - Inflation, Condition, Depth)
(*I) Should be inflated to manufacturer's specification. The specification is written on the tire.
('C') Must be originals. No recaps or retreads. No cuts, rips, bubbles larger than an inch.
('D') Minimum tread depth of 4/32 inch.
RIMS - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, cracked, or broken. No illegal weld.
LUG NUTS - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, break, or crack. No illegal weld. All present. No rust or shiny threads, those are indications of looseness.
HANGERS - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, break, or crack. No illegal weld. Missing no bolts.
LEAF SPRINGS - Properly mounted. Good working condition. No bends, breaks, or cracks. None missing. No illegal weld.
SHOCK - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, break, or crack. No illegal weld. Not missing any bolts. Not leaking any fluid.
BRAKE HOSES / LINES - Properly Mounted. Good Working Condition. No cuts, bubbles, or tears. Not leaking any air. Not making funny sounds. Properly Insulated.
BRAKE DRUMS - Properly mounted. Good working condition. No bends, breaks, or cracks. No illegal welds. No residue build-up. Minimum of ½ inch of life.
BRAKE PADS - Properly Mounted. Good working condition. No bends, breaks, or cracks. No illegal welds. No residue build-up. Minimum of ¼ inch of life.
LENSES & REFLECTORS - Properly mounted, good working conditions. No cracks, no breaks, not missing.

TRAFFIC MONITORING DEVICES/MIRRORS - Properly mounted. Both driver and passenger's side mirrors are working properly. No bends, breaks, or cracks. No illegal welds. No more than 10 inches away from the cab. No illegal stickers. Fully adjustable to the driver's view. (Press the mirror button to adjust both mirrors. Do not use your hand to manually adjust the mirror).
BATTERY BOX - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Properly secured. Connections are tight. Cell caps present. No residue builds up or corrosion. Cover has no damage and is secure.
FUEL TANK - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, break, or crack. No illegal welds. Missing no bolts. Not leaking any fuel. Not filled to more than 90% capacity.
D.E.F. TANK - Properly mounted, good working conditions. No bend, break, crack. Not leaking any fluids, check daily to make sure it's at the proper level. Secured with fuel cap. Easy on and easy off.
FUEL CAP - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, break, or crack. No illegal weld. Secured with a safety chain and a rubber seal.
FUEL TANK STRAPS - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, break, or crack. No illegal weld. Missing no bolts. Must have a rubber seal to prevent metal to metal contact.
FRAME - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, cracked, or broken. No illegal weld.

AIR CONNECTORS - RED is emergency. BLUE is service. Both properly mounted. Good working condition. No cuts, rips, tears, or bubbles. Not leaking any air. Not making any funny sounds. Properly secured to the GLADHANDS. Should be free from tangling lines together (Point to both tractor and trailer sides.)
ELECTRICAL CONNECTOR (might be black or green color) - Properly mounted. Good working condition. No rips, tears, cuts, bubbles. Supplying power to the trailer. Point to both tractor and APRON.
APRON - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, break, or crack. No illegal weld.

FIFTH WHEEL - Properly mounted. Good working condition. No bend, break, or crack. No illegal weld. Missing no bolts. Properly lubricated on the plate. There should be no light or gap between the skid plate/platform (top of the fifth wheel).
RELEASE ARM - Properly mounted. Good working condition. No bends, breaks, or cracks. No illegal welds. Missing no bolts. Make sure to push release arm all the way in before driving the truck away.
SAFETY LATCH - Properly mounted. Good working condition. No bends, breaks, or cracks. No illegal welds.
PLATFORM - Properly mounted. Good working condition. No bends, breaks, or cracks. No illegal welds.
MOUNTING BOLTS - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bends, breaks, or cracks. No illegal welds. No missing bolts. No rust or shiny threads. These are indications of looseness.
KINGPIN - Properly mounted. Good working condition. No bends, breaks, or cracks. No illegal weld. 2-inch steel pin.

LOCKING JAWS/ LEVER - Properly mounted. Good working condition. No bends, breaks, or cracks. No illegal welds. Fully functioning and closing around the kingpin to hold it in place. Properly lubricated.
5th WHEEL LOCKING PIN - Properly mounted. Good working condition. No bends, breaks, or cracks. No illegal weld. (This truck might not have the sliding 5th wheel locking pin)

LANDING GEAR & CLEARANCE - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, cracked, or broken. No illegal welds. Missing no bolts. Fully raised. MAKE SURE THERE IS ENOUGH CLEARANCE BETWEEN THE TIRES FROM THE TRUCK AND LANDING GEAR.

LANDING GEAR RELEASE ARM - Properly mounted. Good working condition. No bends, breaks, or cracks. No illegal weld. Missing no bolts. Functioning properly in both high and low gear. For this trailer high gear is pushed in, and low gear is pulled out. When not in use properly secured so it doesn't cause a hazard.
BRIDGES or FRAME - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not bend, cracked, or broken. No illegal weld.
TOP LIGHTS - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not cracked or broken. None missing. Red in color.

REAR LIGHTS - Properly mounted. Good working condition. Not cracked or broken. None missing. Red in color. Left, right, and 4-way emergency lights, tail lights, brake lights, and clearance lights working properly. Point to both sides of the lights.
REFLECTORS - If present, properly mounted. Good working condition. Not broken or missing.
